$comment: coedit: a coordinated, TRANSACTIONAL multi-file edit - the cross-cutting change single-file edit_file cannot do. Reads several files, regenerates ALL of them for one request, and verifies the whole module ONCE (go vet + go test -race), rolling back every file if it fails. read -> generate -> apply -> done | fix -> reapply -> done | fail. Input: '<comma-separated files> <request>'. proj = $workspace. Run: `ratchet flow . coedit --ws <proj> "a.go,b.go,c.go <change across them>"`.
summary: Apply one change across several files at once, verified atomically over the whole module (go vet + go test -race), with rollback - for cross-cutting edits like a signature change.
